title: Youth Class Series #1: Helga Zepp-LaRouche "Statecraft for a New Economic Order"
description:
On January 24, 2026, Schiller Institute founder  Helga Zepp-LaRouche gave the first in a series of Schiller Institute classes for the growing International Youth Movement for a new, just security and development architecture. Young people from around the world, including such nations as Nigeria, Yemen, Burkina Faso, Mali, Niger, Uganda, Kenya, Colombia, Venezuela, and Mexico met to learn of the ideas of Lyndon LaRouche, Gottfried Leibniz, and Friedrich Schiller from Helga.

This video contains her lecture, which emphasizes the subjective transformation that young people must take on in order to qualify themselves for leadership during a period of great strategic danger and even greater potential for an harmonious future.
